html_005: Discover your love type through your choices.
html_006: Then check your sweet compatibility with someone special.
html_025: Pick both of your top love languages
html_031: This is just for fun. The real answer lives in your conversations with each other 🤍
js_002: Someone whose whole day turns on a single sentence
js_003: Sincere words are oxygen to you. A simple “great job” or “thank you” reaches deep, and praise and encouragement make you glow.
js_004: Praise them specifically. Instead of “nice job,” try “that part of your presentation today really stuck with me.” A text or a handwritten note goes a long way too.
js_005: Silence can feel like love fading. Remember your partner might just be clumsy with words, not short on feelings.
js_007: Someone for whom love means being there
js_008: Undivided time together is your clearest proof of love. The moment a phone gets put down and eyes meet yours, your heart fills right up.
js_009: Ask for uninterrupted time together, even if it’s brief. A walk around the block or a sit-down dinner is enough.
js_010: It’s easy to feel hurt when your partner’s busy. Try agreeing on “focused quality” over sheer quantity of time.
js_012: Someone who treasures tokens of the heart
js_013: To you, a gift isn’t an object — it’s proof someone was thinking of you. Even something tiny carries a meaning you catch instantly.
js_014: Tell them it’s not the price tag, it’s the “thought that counts” trace. Something small spotted on the street can mean the world.
js_015: Don’t doubt the love just because gifts are missing. Your partner may already be showing love in a different language.
js_017: Someone who feels reassured by actions, not words
js_018: “I’ve got this” followed by real help is the deepest love you know. Action over words, follow-through over promises — that’s what moves you.
js_019: Ask specifically for the help you need. Asking isn’t weakness — it’s an invitation to closeness.
js_020: It’s easy to leap to “they don’t love me” when help doesn’t come. Try making a specific ask first.
js_022: Someone who confirms love through warmth
js_023: A held hand, a warm hug — that’s what settles you. The warmth beside you calms your heart faster than any words could.
js_024: Ask naturally for light touch. Leaning a shoulder in or holding hands is a small signal that means a lot.
js_025: Less touch can feel like distance growing. Be gentle about checking in on your partner’s mood and circumstances too.
js_026: On a day you’re feeling low, what comforts you more?
js_027: A heartfelt “you’re doing great, you know that?”
js_028: Someone just sitting quietly beside you
js_029: On a special day, what excites you more?
js_030: A handwritten note addressed just to you
js_031: A small gift picked out with care
js_032: At the end of an exhausting day, what means more?
js_033: A “you worked so hard today, I’m proud of you”
js_034: A warm meal made without a word
js_035: When you need reassurance of love, what lands harder?
js_038: What’s the highlight of a date?
js_039: A deep conversation, just the two of you
js_040: A surprise gift, prepared in secret
js_041: When your partner’s swamped, what stays with you more?
js_042: Even a few stolen minutes together
js_043: Them handling one of your tasks for you
js_044: On a lazy weekend afternoon, what’s the happiest scene?
js_045: Sitting face to face, talking endlessly
js_046: Curled up together on the couch
js_047: On an anniversary, what moves you more?
js_048: A gift that nails your exact taste
js_049: Effort spent looking after you all day long
js_050: How do you want “I missed you” delivered?
js_051: As a small gift pressed into your hand
js_052: As a hug the second you’re in sight
js_053: When you’re sick, what comforts you most?
js_054: Medicine fetched and soup simmered for you
js_055: A hand on your forehead, fingers laced with yours
js_056: Making up after a fight, what eases things more?
js_057: A sincere apology and gentle words
js_058: Staying close and easing back into togetherness
js_059: When you’ve accomplished something, what’s more joyful?
js_060: A “I knew you’d pull it off” message
js_061: A gift chosen to mark the celebration
js_062: On a low-confidence day, what helps more?
js_063: A “you’re doing better than you think” pep talk
js_064: Real, practical help that lightens the load
js_065: Right before sleep, what feels cozier?
js_067: A warm hand patting your back
js_068: On an anniversary, what feels more meaningful?
js_069: Time spent together like a mini getaway
js_070: A keepsake gift to hold onto for years
js_071: When you’re running on empty, what comforts more?
js_072: Them resting right there beside you
js_073: Them quietly clearing your to-do list
js_074: When watching a movie together, what’s better?
js_075: Talking it over together once it ends
js_076: Leaning your head on their shoulder the whole time
js_077: On your birthday, what moves you more?
js_078: A surprise gift picked with real thought
js_079: Care that follows you through the whole day
js_080: On a seriously stressful day, what helps you unwind?
js_081: Them taking chores off your hands
js_083: While traveling, what’s the more exciting moment?
js_084: Them secretly buying a souvenir found only there
js_085: A hand held tight while watching the sunset
js_086: On the morning of an anniversary, what’s more thrilling?
js_087: A thoughtfully wrapped box waiting by your pillow
js_088: A good-morning hug the second you open your eyes
js_089: On a Friday night after a rough week, what’s better?
js_090: A surprise dessert picked up just for you on the way home
js_091: A long, plan-free night together, just the two of you
js_092: On moving day, who do you appreciate more?
js_093: Someone who carefully picked a housewarming gift
js_094: Someone who showed up early to help carry boxes
js_095: Before a big exam, what gives you more strength?
js_096: A tiny good-luck charm handed over “just in case”
js_097: A confident “there’s no way you don’t pass this”
js_098: Home sick with a fever, what comforts more?
js_099: Them sitting with you the entire day
js_100: Soup on the stove and medicine already bought
js_101: Making up after a fight, what do you need more?
js_102: Sitting down and really talking it through
js_103: A wordless hug that comes first
js_104: On your birthday, what sticks with you longer?
js_105: Them clearing the whole day just for you
js_106: Sentences of a handwritten note, poured from the heart
js_107: After a bone-tired day, what’s the better ending?
js_108: Coming home to dishes and cleaning already done, no words needed
js_109: Hands working the knots out of your shoulders on the couch
js_110: After a mistake tanks your confidence, what helps more?
js_111: Quietly helping clean up the aftermath, side by side
js_113: Reuniting after a while apart, what greeting feels better?
js_117: Two people speaking the same language. Praise sparks more praise, in a loop that keeps giving.
js_118: You’re both naturals at putting real feeling into your words. Just watch that praise doesn’t go stale from repetition — keep it fresh with new phrasing and specific details.
js_119: Trade one specific compliment, once a day
js_120: When hurt, say it out loud instead of going quiet
js_121: Say “thank you” even for the little, expected things
js_123: Love in words meets love in presence. Deep conversation fills you both up.
js_124: One of you wants words, the other wants time. Luckily, “talking together” is the magic overlap that satisfies both — make space for it on purpose.
js_126: Deliver praise eye-to-eye when you’re together
js_127: Even in busy weeks, keep in touch with a short call
js_129: Words and gifts — a romantic pairing where both of you love to express.
js_130: You’re an expressive couple, so love shows easily on the surface. Tuck a short note in with every gift, and both your languages land at once.
js_131: Add a handwritten line to every gift
js_132: Say thank you out loud, on top of the gift
js_133: On empty-handed days, fill the gap with warm words
js_135: A balance between someone who speaks their love and someone who shows it.
js_136: One of you wants to be told, the other wants to do. After helping out, the acts-of-service half should add “I did it because I love you” — and the words half should answer with a real “thank you.”
js_137: After doing something, say the feeling out loud too
js_138: Thank help received with specific detail
js_139: Recognize that you simply love differently
js_140: Where words and warmth flow together
js_141: Tender words and warm touch — a pairing full of reassurance.
js_142: Words and touch double each other’s effect. A hug paired with “I love you” is the single moment that makes you both happiest at once.
js_143: Pair every hug with a tender word
js_144: On days touch feels like too much, fill in with words
js_145: Build a short affection ritual for morning and bedtime
js_147: A quiet, deep couple who feels complete just being together.
js_148: You both prize time above all, so friction is rare. Just make sure “being together” doesn’t turn into two people staring at separate phones — protect the quality of what you actually do together.
js_150: Start a new hobby you can do together
js_151: Lock in one just-the-two-of-you date, weekly
js_153: Time together blends naturally with the small gifts inside it.
js_154: The time half wants “together,” the gift half wants a “keepsake.” Trade small souvenirs from your shared memories, and the two languages link up naturally.
js_155: Keep a small souvenir from days spent together
js_156: Enjoy “picking it out together” as much as the gift itself
js_157: On busy days, send a short note to bridge the gap
js_159: Being there and rolling up your sleeves — a dependable pairing.
js_160: Acts-of-service help can turn into “doing it alone,” which can leave the time half feeling lonely. Do the task “together” and you fill both needs at once.
js_161: Turn chores into something you do together
js_162: Before helping, ask “want to do this together?” first
js_163: On busy days, sit together even briefly
js_165: Shared time and warm touch — one of the coziest pairings there is.
js_166: Touch naturally weaves into your time together, filling you both up. Just don’t let “together” mean only sitting still — make room for shared experiences too.
js_167: Hold hands while walking or cooking together
js_168: Enjoy quiet time spent simply side by side
js_169: Match your touch frequency to what’s comfortable for both
js_171: A couple who keeps handing each other tokens of love — the excitement never runs dry.
js_172: You both know the joy of a gift well. Make “small and often” your rule so cost never piles up, and the thrill lasts.
js_174: Set your own rule to keep gift-giving pressure-free
js_175: Show real delight when you receive one
js_177: The token of a gift and the devotion of an act — both of you show care deeply.
js_178: One shows care through objects, the other through help. Once you spot that your “care languages” differ, the misunderstandings disappear.
js_179: Treasure your partner’s help like a gift
js_180: Add a practical touch to the gifts you give
js_181: Say exactly what you’re grateful for
js_183: A sweet pairing where the thrill of a gift meets the warmth of touch.
js_184: Hand over a gift with a hug, and the feeling lands instantly for both of you. You’re an expressive couple, so the love is easy to see.
js_185: Pass gifts hand to hand, wrapped in a hug
js_186: On days touch feels awkward, a small gift fills in
js_187: Compliment each other’s way of showing love often
js_188: Bonded through looking after each other
js_189: Two people who take care of things without a word. Deep, solid trust builds up over time.
js_190: You’re a dependable couple who loves through action. Just watch that low expression on both sides doesn’t breed quiet resentment — say the feeling out loud after helping, too.
js_191: After helping, add “I did it because I love you”
js_192: Don’t take your partner’s devotion for granted
js_193: Every so often, say the love out loud too
js_195: Attentive care meets warm touch, and comfort overflows.
js_196: Add the touch half’s warmth to the service half’s care, and the sense of security peaks. A simple shoulder pat while helping out satisfies you both.
js_197: Pair caretaking with a warm touch
js_198: On exhausting days, a hug alone is enough
js_199: Comfort through action and warmth instead of words
js_201: The coziest pairing of all — love confirmed through touch alone.
js_202: You both settle down fast with touch alone. Just don’t let a hug paper over a fight — talk through what actually stung, and the bond grows sturdier.
js_203: Pair a reconciliation hug with real conversation
js_204: Even on busy days, don’t skip a quick touch hello
js_205: Read your partner’s energy before reaching for touch

_app.title: Love Languages: My Type & Compatibility
_app.desc: Find your love language, then check your compatibility with someone special.
